name: Credit Lifter Financial & Credit Advisory
description_short: Credit Lifter Financial & Credit Advisory is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.9/5 with 189 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Lifter Financial & Credit Advisory is a New York-based credit counseling firm specializing in helping consumers understand, repair, and rebuild their credit profiles. Operating in one of the most competitive financial services markets in the country, the firm appears to serve clients who are dealing with negative credit history, high debt loads, or financial situations that have damaged their creditworthiness. With a 4.9-star rating across 189 Google reviews, the company has built a notable local reputation for client satisfaction in a space where trust is notoriously difficult to earn.

As a credit counseling service, Credit Lifter Financial & Credit Advisory reportedly offers guidance on disputing inaccurate or unverifiable items on credit reports, debt management strategies, and personalized financial advisory services. The combination of "Financial & Credit Advisory" in the firm's name suggests a scope that goes beyond mechanical credit repair — positioning the company as a holistic financial guidance resource rather than a dispute-letter factory. Clients seeking both short-term credit remediation and longer-term financial planning may find this dual focus useful.

Consumers considering any credit counseling or credit repair firm should understand a few things before signing on. First, legitimate credit repair takes time — typically 3 to 12 months depending on the complexity of your file — and no ethical provider can guarantee specific score increases. Second, anything a credit repair company does on your behalf, you can legally do yourself for free by disputing errors with the three major bureaus directly. The value a firm like Credit Lifter provides is in expertise, time savings, and strategic guidance. Third, under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), you have specific rights including the right to cancel within three business days and the right to receive a written contract before services begin. Ask any provider to walk you through these before signing.

The firm's near-perfect Google rating is a genuine positive signal, though 189 reviews is a modest sample for a company operating in a major metro market. Prospective clients should request a clear breakdown of services, fees, and realistic timelines during an initial consultation. It is worth verifying whether Credit Lifter is a member of a recognized industry body such as the National Foundation for Credit Counseling (NFCC) or the Financial Counseling Association of America (FCAA), as membership in these organizations signals a commitment to ethical standards. For consumers with complex credit situations or significant negative items, the advisory component of this firm's offering may provide meaningful value beyond what a basic dispute service delivers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Exceptionally high Google rating — 4.9/5 across 189 reviews suggests consistent client satisfaction
New York City presence provides access to clients across one of the largest metro areas in the US
Dual focus on credit repair and broader financial advisory may address root causes, not just symptoms
Credit counseling category implies adherence to regulatory standards under CROA
Established local firm with verifiable review history, offering more accountability than anonymous online-only services
cons: Website (creditlifter.com) provides limited public information on pricing, service tiers, or typical timelines — requires a direct consultation to understand costs
189 reviews, while strong in rating, is a relatively small sample for a New York City firm competing in a large market
No publicly visible accreditation from NFCC or FCAA could not be confirmed — consumers should verify membership status directly
As a local advisory firm, remote or out-of-state clients may find service delivery less convenient than fully digital national providers
The broad advisory positioning makes it harder to evaluate the firm's specific strengths without direct engagement
best_for: Consumers in New York, New York looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Credit Lifter Financial & Credit Advisory appears best suited for consumers in the New York metro area who want personalized, advisory-led credit guidance — particularly those whose credit challenges stem from broader financial management issues rather than simple reporting errors. The main caveat is that pricing and service scope are not transparently published, so consumers should go into the initial consultation prepared to ask detailed questions before committing.
services: Credit report review and analysis across all three major bureaus
Dispute preparation and submission for inaccurate or unverifiable negative items
Debt management counseling and repayment strategy planning
Credit score improvement roadmaps with milestone tracking
Budgeting and personal financial advisory services
Guidance on collections accounts and charge-off negotiation
Credit builder strategies for thin-file or no-file consumers
Financial education and credit literacy coaching
Assistance navigating bankruptcy alternatives and debt settlement options
Ongoing credit monitoring guidance and post-repair maintenance advice
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 1178 Broadway FL 3 STE 1317, New York, NY 10001
